behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, prop names (openDelay, closeDelay), default value (0), and hook name (useDelayedHover) referenced in tests are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms and expected behavior without dictating exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for interface declaration, destructuring, defaultProps value, and non-hardcoded hook arg - all of which any correct fix would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests are regex/string checks on source file contents (e.g., re.search for 'openDelay\s*\?\s*:\s*number'); no runtime execution of the component or type-checking.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific structural changes (interface, defaultProps, destructuring, hook call) that a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Interface acceptance, default of 0, passing to hook, and demo/story file updates are all verified.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with FAIL_TO_PASS and PASS_TO_PASS section comments and descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify but not the exact buggy line; localization is still required.
